r_at_0_definition: predicted coarse token exactly equals GT token
r_at_1_definition: predicted coarse token is at most 1 token from GT in both x and y
input_pixel_interpretation: R@0 requires the same coarse cell; R@1 permits up to 8 input pixels along each axis
